name: pocket-gym
description: Palestre in Zona is a SvelteKit web app for discovering nearby gyms and martial arts clubs.

scripts.check: bun run scripts/check-stock-assets.mjs && bun run scripts/check-copy-slop.mjs && bun run scripts/check-visible-mojibake.mjs && bun ./node_modules/@sveltejs/kit/svelte-kit.js sync && bun ./node_modules/svelte-check/bin/svelte-check --tsconfig ./jsconfig.json
